LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LYMAN PRODUCTS CORPORATION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS. WRITTEN ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: VICKI GROSS, CSR NO. 5525, E-MAIL: VGROSS@SFTC.ORG. (L&M302)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-26-2017 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-06-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Brian C. Johnson of the law offices of The Chanler Group (510-848-8880) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Rebecca L. Woodson of the law offices of Dentons US LLP (415-267-4137) appears as counsel for defendant/non-opposing party, Lyman Products Corporation

The cause is submitted by both sides without argument as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment as to defendant Lyman Products Corporation is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Vicki Gross, CSR No. 5525, e-mail: vgross@sftc.org. (L&M302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-25-2017 Set For Trial On Jan-08-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
